summary: REAL cross-language repo: napi-rs/node-rs (7 npm packages bound to Rust crates via napi-rs). A Rust-side rename breaks @node-rs/jsonwebtoken's TS test suite ACROSS the napi boundary: the failing JS name (verifySync) is a napi case-TRANSFORM of the Rust name (verify_sync), so no literal string crosses the boundary — grep for the failing JS name finds nothing in Rust, and snake_case guesses hit decoy packages (argon2 and bcrypt export their own verify_sync). Validator is dual-side: rebuild the native module, then the repo's own ava spec. The '!*buffer*' match excludes one test broken upstream at the pinned SHA (__dirname under ESM loader), unrelated to the plant.
